'''âsl-d-n''' ('''slodon''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:shout|shout]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sl-d-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:shout|shout]]
|-
! Citation form
| âsl-d-n
|-
! Lemma
| slodon
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisladan|thisladan]] || [[word:jisladan|jisladan]] || [[word:shisladan|shisladan]] || [[word:kisladan|kisladan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusladan|thuthusladan]] || [[word:jujusladan|jujusladan]] || [[word:shushusladan|shushusladan]] || [[word:kukusladan|kukusladan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusladan|thusladan]] || [[word:jusladan|jusladan]] || [[word:shusladan|shusladan]] || [[word:kusladan|kusladan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusladan|thusladan]] || [[word:jusladan|jusladan]] || [[word:shusladan|shusladan]] || [[word:kusladan|kusladan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesladan|thesladan]] || [[word:jesladan|jesladan]] || [[word:shesladan|shesladan]] || [[word:kesladan|kesladan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosladan|thothosladan]] || [[word:jojosladan|jojosladan]] || [[word:shoshosladan|shoshosladan]] || [[word:kokosladan|kokosladan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosladan|thosladan]] || [[word:josladan|josladan]] || [[word:shosladan|shosladan]] || [[word:kosladan|kosladan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosladan|thosladan]] || [[word:josladan|josladan]] || [[word:shosladan|shosladan]] || [[word:kosladan|kosladan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsladan|thĂŠsladan]] || [[word:jĂŠsladan|jĂŠsladan]] || [[word:shĂŠsladan|shĂŠsladan]] || [[word:kĂŠsladan|kĂŠsladan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasladan|thathasladan]] || [[word:jajasladan|jajasladan]] || [[word:shashasladan|shashasladan]] || [[word:kakasladan|kakasladan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasladan|thasladan]] || [[word:jasladan|jasladan]] || [[word:shasladan|shasladan]] || [[word:kasladan|kasladan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasladan|thasladan]] || [[word:jasladan|jasladan]] || [[word:shasladan|shasladan]] || [[word:kasladan|kasladan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasladan|shasladan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasladan|goshasladan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasladan|gokishasladan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasladanĂŒ|shasladanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasladanknĂŒ|goshasladanknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasladanĂŒ|gokishasladanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasladanshĂ«|shasladanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasladankshĂ«|goshasladankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasladanshĂ«|gokishasladanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasladanro|shasladanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasladankro|goshasladankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasladanro|gokishasladanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasladanmu|shasladanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasladankmu|goshasladankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasladanmu|gokishasladanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasladansher|shasladansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasladanksher|goshasladanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasladansher|gokishasladansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasladang|shasladang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasladankng|goshasladankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasladang|gokishasladang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasladanya|shasladanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasladankya|goshasladankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasladanya|gokishasladanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasladanyam|shasladanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasladankyam|goshasladankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasladanyam|gokishasladanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasladanĂŒshĂ«|shasladanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasladanknĂŒshĂ«|goshasladanknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasladanĂŒshĂ«|gokishasladanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasladanĂŒro|shasladanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasladanknĂŒro|goshasladanknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasladanĂŒro|gokishasladanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasladanĂŒmu|shasladanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasladanknĂŒmu|goshasladanknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasladanĂŒmu|gokishasladanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasladanshĂ«nĂŒ|shasladanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasladankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasladankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasladanshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasladanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasladanshĂ«ro|shasladanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasladankshĂ«ro|goshasladankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasladanshĂ«ro|gokishasladanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasladanshĂ«mu|shasladanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasladankshĂ«mu|goshasladankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasladanshĂ«mu|gokishasladanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasladanronĂŒ|shasladanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasladankronĂŒ|goshasladankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasladanronĂŒ|gokishasladanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasladanroshĂ«|shasladanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasladankroshĂ«|goshasladankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasladanroshĂ«|gokishasladanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasladanromu|shasladanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasladankromu|goshasladankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasladanromu|gokishasladanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasladanmunĂŒ|shasladanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasladankmunĂŒ|goshasladankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasladanmunĂŒ|gokishasladanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasladanmushĂ«|shasladanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasladankmushĂ«|goshasladankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasladanmushĂ«|gokishasladanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasladanmuro|shasladanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasladankmuro|goshasladankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasladanmuro|gokishasladanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
